holdings.infoBox: ITA is an equity ETF with a total of 49 individual holdings. The top holdings are GE Aerospace stock at 21.13%, RTX Corporation at 14.51%, The Boeing Company at 9.44%, Howmet Aerospace at 4.87%, and General Dynamics at 4.60%.

overview.description: The iShares U.S. Aerospace & Defense ETF (ITA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the DJ US Select / Aerospace & Defense index, a market-cap-weighted index of US manufacturers, assemblers and distributors of airplane and defense equipment. ITA was launched on May 1, 2006 and is issued by BlackRock.
